description: Lock self_healing_civil_infrastructure to civil public-works systems combining smart/self-healing materials, robotic inspection or repair, and digital-twin monitoring rather than a separate nanobot-infrastructure duplicate.

checks.reason: Self-healing infrastructure requires materials that can sense damage or autonomously repair cracks.
Robotic inspection and maintenance provide the field repair layer for distributed civil assets.
Digital twins provide sensor-updated monitoring and predictive-maintenance models for civil infrastructure.
